title: Account protection - Canada.ca
content:
If you notice any suspicious activity, reset your password immediately.

## How to reset your password

### Interac ® Sign-In Partner
- Visit your financial institution’s sign-in page
- Follow the instructions to reset your password
For assistance, visit Interac ® Sign-In Partner contact page.
- Select the “GCKey username and password” button from My Service Canada Account
- Enter your username and password
- Select “Change your password” and follow the instructions
To speak to a GCKey representative, visit GCKey Contact us .

### Provincial Sign-In Partner ( BC and AB only)
- Visit your provincial sign-in page
- Follow the instructions to reset your password
For assistance, visit:
- BC Services Card Contact us
- Alberta.ca Account - Contact
If you need additional assistance with changing your sign-in option or if your account is locked, contact our Registration and Authentication help desk:
The hours of operation are 8:30 am to 4:30 pm local time, Monday to Friday (closed on civic holidays).
Register with Canada VRS to download the app and call the VRS line.
If you use any other operator-assisted relay service, call our regular toll-free number listed on this page instead of the Canada VRS number.
1-506-548-7009 (Long-distance charges apply.)
The hours of operation are 8:00 am to 8:30 pm Atlantic time, Monday to Friday (closed on civic holidays).
Our service standard is to answer your call within 10 minutes. Please see below our average wait times for the week of June 1, 2026.
This is the average length of time that callers wait in queue before speaking to an agent.

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
